Name: NPC_TALK_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines dialogue, voice playback, UI behavior, and timing settings for NPC conversations.

Fields.Name: Message ID
Fields.Description: ID of the dialogue message text to display.

Fields.Name: Voice ID
Fields.Description: ID of the voice audio associated with the dialogue.

Fields.Name: Action ID
Fields.Description: ID of the action or animation performed during the dialogue.

Fields.Name: Window Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the type or style of dialogue window used.

Fields.Name: Continuous Conversation
Fields.Description: Determines whether the next dialogue entry should play automatically.

Fields.Name: Name Replacement Flag NPC ID
Fields.Description: NPC ID used to control or override the displayed speaker name.

Fields.Name: Wait Time
Fields.Description: Amount of time to wait after the dialogue ends before continuing.
